description: Test to verify that a user can successfully login to OrangeHRM with valid username and password

steps.name: Browser Setup - WebDriver initialized with chrome browser
Username Input - Username 'Admin' entered in username field
Password Input - Password entered in password field
Button Click - Login button clicked successfully
